problem id: ac0d032d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND SHL(1)

examples:
  10100010 -> 00000000
  00001101 -> 00010000
  10101101 -> 01011010
  01010100 -> 00000000
  11011001 -> 10010000
  01101111 -> 11010110
  11010010 -> 00100100
  10100111 -> 01001010

query: 10011010
predicted answer: 00100000
